title: Understanding the Mediation Role of Mobility Patterns in the Relationship between Socioeconomic Status and Depression in South Carolina Counties
intent: To investigate how the spatial patterns of place visitation influence the relationship between neighborhood socioeconomic status and depression prevalence across counties in South Carolina.

scale.spatial_scale: County level within the state of South Carolina

data_requirement: Socioeconomic characteristics of counties in South Carolina
Depression prevalence data for counties in South Carolina
Spatial patterns of place visitation for counties in South Carolina
Geographical boundaries of counties in South Carolina
data_available_sufficiency: The available data includes socioeconomic data, depression prevalence, visitation patterns to places, and county boundary geometries for South Carolina. These datasets appear comprehensive and aligned with the needs to address the research question.
data_available: Socioeconomic status data (SC_ACS_data) with various demographic and economic indicators
